segments.text: Let me repeat the introduction part. I'm Dr. Sreena George. I'm calling from Tata AIA Life Insurance. This call is being recorded for the company's audit and quality purposes. I will ask a few questions related to the insurance application. It will take 10 to 12 minutes. The replies and information you provide, all information about health habits will be for the insurance application. If this proposal is accepted, based on that, an insurance and a legal contract will be formed between you and the insurer.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: If any incorrect or false statements are made, it may affect the contract and there's a possibility that the policy may be cancelled in the future. So, before or after issuance, there's a chance that the claim might be rejected later. So, please respond thoughtfully and correctly. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yeah, okay. Please confirm your full name.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Please confirm your date of birth.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. What is your highest educational qualification?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. What are you doing now? What's your job?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I am currently working in a company called Hubbell India in Kakkanad.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Can you please show me your ID card?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: The last four digits of your Aadhaar, can you please read it out?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Are you speaking from Kakkanad or Ernakulam now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I'm speaking from my home now.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: I asked because I need your current location.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Now, there's a full complete view verification, that is, from head to toe. From head to foot, there will be a complete view verification. For that, you can either place the phone somewhere and stand, or hold it in selfie mode and show.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, that's enough. Head to toe should be visible.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: That's fine too, no problem. It's just for verification. Toe is not clear.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Now, some health-related... One minute.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Was anyone else called for this today? For verification?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I received another phone call, so it got disconnected.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Before this, did anyone else from Tata AIA call you today?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no. The one who called before was the doctor, right? Ah, it was me who called before. No one else called.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Now, some health, personal, like lifestyle-related questions. Health and lifestyle-related questions. In the last 24 months, have you ever smoked or used tobacco/nicotine products?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Has any doctor ever told you to stop alcohol or not to consume alcohol, or anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Have you ever used recreational drugs or narcotics without a licensed physician's prescription? Any drugs, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. What is your height, please tell me?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Now I will ask about some disease conditions. If you have any of them, please tell me the details. Okay. High or low blood pressure (BP), or high cholesterol, triglycerides, or high lipids, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Chest pain, or chest discomfort, like heaviness in the chest, heart murmur, or heart attack, coronary artery disease, heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath, any heart-related conditions?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer, or carcinoma in situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumors, polyps, nodules, cysts, lumps, or any kind of growth in the body, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Do you have diabetes? High blood sugar, or sugar in urine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hyperthyroidism or hypothyroidism, or any other thyroid-related issues, any other endocrine issues, hormonal issues, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, or chronic pulmonary disease, COPD-like chronic pulmonary disease, any respiratory disorders like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any other hepatitis, or are you a hepatitis carrier? Do you have fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, anything like that? Any liver-related issues?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any other anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus, any blood-related diseases, or any autoimmune diseases, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limbs, stroke, transient ischemic attack, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, dementia, Alzheimer's, any memory loss diseases, or any nervous system-related, mental health-related diseases, anything like that? Migraine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease, stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pancreatitis, any issues related to our pancreas, stomach, intestines, anything related to these?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kidney stones or gallstones, or kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in the urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele, any issues related to our kidney, bladder, genital, prostate, or our entire urinary system?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Persistent back pain, or joint problems, arthritis, gout, high uric acid, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, any other deformities, physical disability, any diseases related to our muscles, bones, joints, limbs, spine, etc.?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Blindness, cataract, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision, or any eye-related diseases? Do you use glasses, spectacles or lenses?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, okay. Any deafness, impaired hearing, hearing loss, or speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, or discharge from the ear, like fluid? Any diseases related to our ear, nose, throat?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Is there anything else to say for our policy process and information? Any other relevant medical histories, or vitamin deficiencies, anything like that to mention?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, currently nothing. I am an actively fit person. So, there are no other issues currently.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Do we do annual health check-ups every year? Do you get your blood routine checked every year? Anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I don't usually do that. Currently, for the past three-four years, I've been actively doing gym and other activities. So I don't have any issues currently. That's why I don't get checked.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Other than what you've mentioned, in the last five years, I will ask a few things, if there is anything, please mention. That is, in the last five years, have you ever had any abnormal medical findings? Any test results, like X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan, biopsy, ECG, treadmill, endoscopy, colonoscopy, or any abnormal blood or urine tests, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Any medications or treatment that you've taken for more than two weeks? Or did you have to consult a specialist doctor, or go to the hospital? Any other special investigations, or tests, or consultations you had to undergo?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No. Have you been unable to go to work for more than two weeks, or unable to do our daily activities, the things we do every day, or anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any congenital defects or disorders, hereditary diseases, birth defects, like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, poliomyelitis, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. This question might be a bit sensitive, but it's for insurance purposes. Have you or your spouse ever undergone any test, treatment, medical advice, or counseling related to sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any test or treatment or counseling related to that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Other than the things you've told me, is there any unexplained weight loss or weight gain, or any relevant signs and symptoms currently? And for that, are you awaiting any medical advice, treatment, or any surgical procedure?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: That's all. I will now read the declaration statement.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Should I read it in English only?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You hereby declare and agree that particulars and answers to the above questions are complete and true and these responses will form a part of the policy records. Okay, that's all.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Thank you for your information and cooperation. Have a nice day. Thank you.
segments.speaker: doctor
